headline: Prudential Financial Recommends Shareholders Reject Unsolicited Mini-Tender Offer from Potemkin Limited
summary: NEWARK, N.J., April 13, 2026--Prudential Financial, Inc. (NYSE: PRU) ("Prudential") announced today that it has received notice of an unsolicited mini-tender offer by Potemkin Limited ("Potemkin") to purchase up to 100,000 shares of Prudential common stock from Prudential shareholders. The offer represents approximately 0.03% of Prudential’s shares of common stock outstanding. Potemkin’s offer price of $60.70 per share is approximately 37.36% below the $96.90 closing price of Prudential common s
